name: French & Francophone Studies
note: A grade of C (2.0) or higher must be earned in all courses counted toward the minor. FRE-315 Oral and Written Communication Skills (WE) is required. Up to one credit may be from approved courses taught in English. FRE-499 Exit Exam and Interview is required during the final term.

sections.label: Four Credits of 300-400 Level French
sections.description: Four credits of courses in 300- to 400-level French, including FRE-315. Up to one credit may be from approved courses taught in English.
